title: Monsoon Bisque with Citrusy Crostini
description: A creamy and refreshing Ukrainian-inspired soup, topped with a citrusy and pillowy crostini.

ingredients.name: Monsoon Bisque Base
ingredients.notes: Blend cooked vegetables with chicken or vegetable broth

ingredients.name: Ukrainian Sour Cream
ingredients.notes: Add a tangy twist with this traditional Ukrainian ingredient

ingredients.name: Citrusy Crostini Topping
ingredients.notes: Combine citrus zest, olive oil, and breadcrumbs for a crunchy topping

ingredients.name: Pillowy Breadcrumbs
ingredients.notes: Use soft white bread for the best results

instructions: Heat the bisque base over low heat.
Add Ukrainian sour cream and stir until combined.
Prepare the citrusy crostini topping by mixing citrus zest, olive oil, and breadcrumbs.
Add pillowy breadcrumbs to the crostini topping and mix well.
Serve the bisque hot, topped with the citrusy crostini.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with additional citrus zest, if desired.
